MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Appellant: Portery McFadden
Respondent: Marco Madrid and Demitri Cornet

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.
All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Marco Medina testifies on his own behalf.
Demitri Cornet testifies on his own behalf.
Portery McFadden testifies on her own behalf.

At the end of today's hearing, the Judge takes the matter under submisson
